_meta.note: Update forecast_finish and done fields after each schedule upload

milestones.label: Letter of Award (LOA)
milestones.description: Contract award — project start signal. Marks the official commencement of the EPC contract.

milestones.label: 10.A-Kick-off Meeting Completed
milestones.description: Formal kick-off meeting with all key stakeholders. Baseline schedule and interfaces agreed.
milestones.notes: Finish variance 116 days in Feb-2026 data

milestones.label: 113.E-Start Piping Prefabrication
milestones.description: Start of piping prefabrication works at workshop. Approval of vendor data for FG & OG compressor required.

milestones.label: 117.E-Start Piping Erection
milestones.description: Start of piping erection works on site.

milestones.label: 1.A*-Issue Engineering Procedure
milestones.description: Issue of engineering procedures and standards documentation to site.

milestones.label: Turnaround Scope Completion (TA)
milestones.description: Completion of all turnaround scope items. Gate milestone before main construction ramp.

milestones.label: 94.E*-Commence on SITE
milestones.description: Official commencement of construction activities on site.

milestones.label: Engineering Workshops — 60% Model Review
milestones.description: 60% 3D model review workshop with owner and engineering team. Freeze on major design decisions.

milestones.label: Off Gas Compressor delivery
milestones.description: OG Compressor delivered to site. Delivery was delayed vs early finish date.
milestones.notes: Early finish was 6 Feb, actual delivery ~1 Mar

milestones.label: Engineering Workshops — 90% Model Review
milestones.description: 90% 3D model review workshop. Final IFC package sign-off. Construction drawings released.

milestones.label: 101.E-Complete all Piperack foundations
milestones.description: Completion of all piperack foundation concrete works. Prerequisite for structural steel erection.

milestones.label: 76.D*-Compressors delivered to SITE
milestones.description: FG Compressor (and associated equipment) delivered to site. CRITICAL — 111 days late, drives all downstream construction.
milestones.notes: Worst slip on CP: +111d. Early finish was 3 Mar 2026.

milestones.label: Feed Gas Compressor (Baseplate, Gear, Gas Seal)
milestones.description: FG Compressor baseplate, gearbox and gas seal components delivered. Part of the FGC delivery package.

milestones.label: 110.E-Complete installation Turbines/Compressors
milestones.description: Complete mechanical installation of all turbines and compressors on their foundations.

milestones.label: 102.E-Complete all underground piping
milestones.description: Completion of all underground piping, including buried utilities and process lines.

milestones.label: 86.D*-Bulk piping materials final MTO to SITE
milestones.description: Final bulk piping materials (valves, fittings, pipe) delivered to site per final MTO.

milestones.label: 88.D-Bulk electrical materials final MTO to SITE
milestones.description: Final bulk electrical materials (cable, conduit, accessories) delivered to site.

milestones.label: 90.D-Bulk instrument materials final MTO to SITE
milestones.description: Final bulk instrument materials delivered to site.

milestones.label: 82.D-Instrument Control SYSTEMS for CCB to SITE
milestones.description: Instrument control systems (DCS/SIS panels, CCB equipment) delivered to site.

milestones.label: 79.D*-All major electrical Equipment to SITE
milestones.description: All major electrical equipment (MV/LV switchgear, transformers, MCC) delivered to site.

milestones.label: 115.E-Complete prefabrication 98% piping
milestones.description: 98% completion of all piping prefabrication (spools, assemblies) at workshop and laydown.

milestones.label: 81.D*-Major instrument control SYSTEMS to SITE
milestones.description: Major instrument and control system packages delivered to site (analyser shelter, fire & gas system).

milestones.label: 83.D-Field instrument tagged items to SITE
milestones.description: All field-tagged instrument items (transmitters, control valves, gauges) delivered to site.

milestones.label: 125.E-Complete Heat Tracing, Insulation & Painting
milestones.description: Completion of all heat tracing installations, pipe insulation and surface painting.

milestones.label: 106.E-Complete steel structural works
milestones.description: Completion of all structural steel erection and bolting. Includes pipe racks SR81 and compressor area.

milestones.label: 119.E-Piping Erection 100% complete
milestones.description: 100% completion of all above-ground piping erection works.

milestones.label: 122.E-Piping Hydrotesting 100% complete
milestones.description: 100% completion of all piping hydrotest, leak test, and reinstatement activities.

milestones.label: 129.E-Complete electrical cabling & termination
milestones.description: Completion of all electrical cable pulling, glanding and termination works.

milestones.label: 136.E-Complete instrumentation loop checks
milestones.description: Completion of all instrument loop checks, calibration and functional testing.

milestones.label: Analyzer (PO pending) — delivery
milestones.description: Process analyser package delivery to site. PO was pending at time of baseline — high risk item.
milestones.notes: PO still pending at baseline — high procurement risk

milestones.label: 8.A*-As Built drawings handover to COMPANY
milestones.description: Handover of all as-built drawings, marked-up P&IDs and engineering documents to COMPANY.

milestones.label: 138.F-Mechanical Completion
milestones.description: Mechanical Completion — all physical installation work completed, punch list category A cleared. Baseline was 20 Jan 2027, slipped +62d to 23 Mar 2027 due to FG Compressor delivery delay.

milestones.label: Ready for Start-up (RFSU)
milestones.description: Ready for Start-up — all pre-commissioning activities complete, utilities available, systems ready for introduction of process fluids.

milestones.label: Provisional Acceptance Certificate (PAC)
milestones.description: Provisional Acceptance Certificate issued by COMPANY after successful commissioning and performance testing.
